description: A biomedical researcher needs a publication-quality figure for a journal article using the CT Cranium DICOM scan loaded in InVesalius 3. Create a 3D surface reconstruction of the skull using the standard Bone preset (226–3071 HU). Configure the 3D viewer with a solid white background and orient the camera to a standard anterior (frontal) view. Export the rendered image as a PNG to /home/ga/Documents/skull_frontal_pub.png. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
